name: updateDashboard
description: Update an existing dashboard by UID. Provide the full dashboard JSON document. Use overwrite=true to skip version conflict checks, or provide the current version number for optimistic concurrency control.

dashboardUid.description: The dashboard UID (stable external identifier). You can find UIDs using the `listDashboards()` tool.

dashboardJson.description: The full dashboard document as a JSON string. Must include required fields: name, owner, charts (array), layout (array), refreshTime (15, 60, or 300), schemaVersion (2), timeWindowStart, timeWindowEnd.

overwrite.description: When true (default), bypasses version checks and applies last-write-wins. When false, the version parameter is required.

version.description: The current dashboard version number. Required when overwrite is false. Get this from exportDashboard().

message.description: Optional audit/change note for this operation.
